description: Initial screen state: The user is on the 'Studies' page of the Askable platform, viewing a dashboard with a table of research studies.
frame_description: The 'Studies' dashboard is visible, showing a table of various research projects with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, and dates.

description: User clicks on the 'Closing date' column header to sort the table.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Closing date' table header.

description: The studies table re-sorts based on the closing date.
frame_description: The list of studies in the table has re-ordered.

description: User clicks on the 'Title' column header to sort the table.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Title' table header.

description: The studies table re-sorts alphabetically by title.
frame_description: The list of studies in the table has re-ordered.

description: User clicks on the 'Studies' heading text in the main content area.
frame_description: The cursor is over the main 'Studies' page heading.

description: The page reloads as the user clicks the sidebar link for the current page.
frame_description: The screen flickers as the page content refreshes.

description: User clicks the sidebar toggle button to expand the navigation menu.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the three-line hamburger icon at the top of the sidebar.

description: The sidebar navigation menu expands to show text labels.
frame_description: The sidebar width increases and labels like 'Studies' and 'Notifications' become visible.

description: User clicks on 'Project Delivery' in the sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Project Delivery' menu item in the sidebar.

description: The 'Project Delivery' menu expands to reveal sub-options.
frame_description: A sub-menu appears under 'Project Delivery' containing options like 'Interview study' and 'Participant recruitment'.

description: User clicks on 'Interview study' within the Project Delivery menu.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Interview study' option in the expanded sidebar menu.

description: The application navigates to the study creation flow.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the dashboard to a white loading state and then to the study setup page.

description: The 'Give your study a title' setup page is displayed with a pre-filled title.
frame_description: The page shows a 'Study title' input field containing the text 'Askable Product Team - 026 - 12 participants'.

description: User clears the pre-filled text in the study title input field.
frame_description: The 'Study title' input field is now empty.

description: User types a new title for the study: 'TV Streaming - Discovery'.
frame_description: The text 'TV Streaming - Discovery' is entered into the input field.

description: User appends ' - Discovery' to the study title.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Study title' step of the study setup.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed.
frame_description: The user clicks 'Next' after finishing the study title.

description: A loading spinner appears while the next step is being prepared.
frame_description: A loading spinner is visible as the next step is prepared.

description: The 'Research method' step loads.

description: User hovers over the 'Video Call' option.
frame_description: The user considers the moderated research options.

description: User selects 'Video Call' as the research method.
frame_description: The user selects 'Video Call' as the research method.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.

description: User types 'United states' into the location field.

description: Autocomplete suggestions appear for the location input.

description: User selects 'United States' from the autocomplete list.

description: The map updates to show the United States and a tag is added.

description: User clicks the 'Delete' button next to the 'Australia' location tag.

description: Australia is removed from the locations and the map updates.
